name: Ruby Dev Container
postCreateCommand: echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/share/gem/ruby/3.4.0/bin:$PATH"' >> ~/.bashrc && bash -lc 'cd /workspaces && if [ -f Gemfile ]; then bundle install; fi'
postStartCommand: bash -lc 'cd /workspaces && if [ -f bin/rails ]; then for i in {1..20}; do bundle exec rails db:prepare && break || sleep 2; done; fi'
